doi_1b_z: 1-bar OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_4b_z: 4-bar (20m) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_12b_z: 12-bar (1h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_48b_z: 48-bar (4h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_288b_z: 288-bar (24h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
oi_fuel: OI fuel ratio: (OI - trailing 24h mean OI) / 24h mean OI
oi_fuel_z: OI fuel ratio z-scored over trailing 30d
oi_pctile_30d: OI level percentile rank within trailing 30d window
deleverage_dir: 1h OI-change z times sign of 1h return (deleveraging direction)
oi_flush_flag: 1 if 1h dOI z < -2 while |1h return| below its trailing 30d median (absorption setup)
oi_spike_flat: 1 if 1h dOI z > +2 while price flat (|1h ret| below trailing 30d median)
cascade_signed: liquidation-cascade proxy: 1h range pctile(30d) > 0.95 AND 1h dOI z < -2, signed by 1h return direction
cascade_decel: 1 if cascade proxy fired within last 6 bars and current 1-bar range z is falling (exhaustion)
tt_pos_ls_z: top-trader position long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
tt_pos_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in top-trader position L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
tt_acct_ls_z: top-trader account long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
tt_acct_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in top-trader account L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
global_ls_z: global account long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
global_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in global account L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
taker_ls_z: taker buy/sell volume ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
taker_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in taker buy/sell volume ratio, z-scored over 30d
taker_ls_z_ema: EMA(span=48, 4h) of taker L/S volume ratio z-score
ls_divergence: smart-vs-crowd divergence: z(top-trader position L/S) minus z(global account L/S)
funding_last_z: last settled Binance funding rate, z-scored over trailing 90d of settlements (asof <= t)
funding_pctile_90d: last settled funding rate percentile within trailing 90d of settlements
pred_funding_bps: predicted next funding proxy: trailing 8h mean of premium index close, in bps
mins_to_funding: calendar minutes until next funding settlement (00/08/16 UTC), in (0,480]
prefund_extreme: sign(pred_funding_z) when <=60min to funding AND |pred_funding_z|>1.5, else 0
crowding_score: crowding: -z(funding,30d) * z(OI fuel,30d) -- crowded-short fuel positive
prem_bps: premium index close in bps (perp mark premium over index)
prem_z96: premium index close z-scored over trailing 96 bars (8h)
prem_chg12_bps: 12-bar (1h) change in premium index close, in bps
basis_z288: spot-perp basis z-scored over trailing 288 bars (24h)
basis_chg12_z: 12-bar change in spot-perp basis, z-scored over trailing 30d
deribit_fund_spread_bps: Deribit interest_8h (asof) minus last Binance funding rate, in bps
deribit_fund_spread_z: Deribit-Binance funding spread z-scored over trailing 30d
